statements.sql:
select
COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as total_sales,
COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) as total_paid,
COALESCE(SUM(debt_amount), 0) as total_debt,
COUNT(*) as total_transactions,
SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'lunas' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as payment_lunas,
SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'terhutang' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as payment_terhutang
from `sales` where `deleted_at` is null and `sale_date` between '2026-03-31 00:00:00' and '2026-06-29 23:59:59' and `sales`.`deleted_at` is null limit 1

explain.query:
select 
                COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as total_sales,
                COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) as total_paid,
                COALESCE(SUM(debt_amount), 0) as total_debt,
                COUNT(*) as total_transactions,
                SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'lunas' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as payment_lunas,
                SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'terhutang' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as payment_terhutang
             from `sales` where `deleted_at` is null and `sale_date` between ? and ? and `sales`.`deleted_at` is null limit 1

statements.sql:
select
sales.id,
sales.sale_date,
sales.customer_name,
sales.total_amount,
sales.paid_amount,
sales.debt_amount,
sales.status,
warehouses.name as warehouse_name,
COALESCE(SUM(sale_items.quantity), 0) as qty
from `sales` left join `warehouses` on `sales`.`warehouse_id` = `warehouses`.`id` left join `sale_items` on `sale_items`.`sale_id` = `sales`.`id` and `sale_items`.`deleted_at` is null where `sales`.`deleted_at` is null and `sales`.`sale_date` between '2026-03-31 00:00:00' and '2026-06-29 23:59:59' and `sales`.`deleted_at` is null group by `sales`.`id`, `sales`.`sale_date`, `sales`.`customer_name`, `sales`.`total_amount`, `sales`.`paid_amount`, `sales`.`debt_amount`, `sales`.`status`, `warehouses`.`name` order by `sales`.`sale_date` desc, `sales`.`id` desc limit 5

explain.query:

                COALESCE(SUM(sale_items.quantity), 0) as qty
             from `sales` left join `warehouses` on `sales`.`warehouse_id` = `warehouses`.`id` left join `sale_items` on `sale_items`.`sale_id` = `sales`.`id` and `sale_items`.`deleted_at` is null where `sales`.`deleted_at` is null and `sales`.`sale_date` between ? and ? and `sales`.`deleted_at` is null group by `sales`.`id`, `sales`.`sale_date`, `sales`.`customer_name`, `sales`.`total_amount`, `sales`.`paid_amount`, `sales`.`debt_amount`, `sales`.`status`, `warehouses`.`name` order by `sales`.`sale_date` desc, `sales`.`id` desc limit 5

statements.sql:
select
products.name as product_name,
product_variants.name as variant_name,
COALESCE(SUM(sale_items.quantity), 0) as total_qty,
COALESCE(SUM(sale_items.subtotal), 0) as total_revenue
from `sale_items` inner join `sales` on `sale_items`.`sale_id` = `sales`.`id` inner join `product_stocks` on `sale_items`.`product_stock_id` = `product_stocks`.`id` inner join `product_variants` on `product_stocks`.`product_variant_id` = `product_variants`.`id` inner join `products` on `product_variants`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` where `sale_items`.`deleted_at` is null and `sales`.`deleted_at` is null and `product_stocks`.`deleted_at` is null and `product_variants`.`deleted_at` is null and `products`.`deleted_at` is null and `sales`.`sale_date` between '2026-03-31 00:00:00' and '2026-06-29 23:59:59' group by `products`.`name`, `product_variants`.`name` order by `total_qty` desc limit 5

             from `sale_items` inner join `sales` on `sale_items`.`sale_id` = `sales`.`id` inner join `product_stocks` on `sale_items`.`product_stock_id` = `product_stocks`.`id` inner join `product_variants` on `product_stocks`.`product_variant_id` = `product_variants`.`id` inner join `products` on `product_variants`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` where `sale_items`.`deleted_at` is null and `sales`.`deleted_at` is null and `product_stocks`.`deleted_at` is null and `product_variants`.`deleted_at` is null and `products`.`deleted_at` is null and `sales`.`sale_date` between ? and ? group by `products`.`name`, `product_variants`.`name` order by `total_qty` desc limit 5

from `product_stocks` inner join `warehouses` on `product_stocks`.`warehouse_id` = `warehouses`.`id` where `product_stocks`.`deleted_at` is null and `warehouses`.`deleted_at` is null group by `warehouses`.`id`, `warehouses`.`name` order by `total_stock` desc

statements.sql:
select
warehouses.id,
warehouses.name,
warehouses.type,
warehouses.city,
COALESCE(SUM(sale_items.quantity), 0) as total_qty_terjual,
COALESCE(SUM(sale_items.subtotal), 0) as total_revenue,
COUNT(DISTINCT sales.id) as total_transaksi
from `sale_items` inner join `sales` on `sale_items`.`sale_id` = `sales`.`id` inner join `warehouses` on `sales`.`warehouse_id` = `warehouses`.`id` where `sale_items`.`deleted_at` is null and `sales`.`deleted_at` is null and `warehouses`.`deleted_at` is null and `sales`.`sale_date` between '2026-03-31 00:00:00' and '2026-06-29 23:59:59' group by `warehouses`.`id`, `warehouses`.`name`, `warehouses`.`type`, `warehouses`.`city` order by `total_qty_terjual` desc limit 5

                COUNT(DISTINCT sales.id) as total_transaksi
             from `sale_items` inner join `sales` on `sale_items`.`sale_id` = `sales`.`id` inner join `warehouses` on `sales`.`warehouse_id` = `warehouses`.`id` where `sale_items`.`deleted_at` is null and `sales`.`deleted_at` is null and `warehouses`.`deleted_at` is null and `sales`.`sale_date` between ? and ? group by `warehouses`.`id`, `warehouses`.`name`, `warehouses`.`type`, `warehouses`.`city` order by `total_qty_terjual` desc limit 5
